compressed_context:
H1: CHALLENGE-OF-CLIMATE-CHANGE-LEADERSHIP  
DEF: GREENHOUSE-GAS(GHG)  
DEF: UNFCCC ENTERED-1994 = SOFT-LAW GLOBAL CLIMATE-FRAMEWORK  
DEF: KYOTO-PROTOCOL(1997) = HARD-LAW EXTENSION OF UNFCCC  
SCOPE: ANNEX-B PARTIES ASSIGNED GHG-TARGETS FOR PERIOD:2008–2012  
TARGET: GHG AGGREGATE=Y/Y-5% VS 1990  
DEF: CLEAN-DEVELOPMENT-MECHANISM(CDM) ART12  
DEF: CERTIFIED-EMISSION-REDUCTIONS(CERs)  
ACTION: CDM ALLOWS ANNEX-B TO FUND CLEAN-PROJECTS IN NON-ANNEX-I STATES  
RESULT: CERs ISSUED TO ANNEX-B PARTIES; OFFSET AGAINST TARGETS  
REGION: CDM PROJECTS OPERATE IN EUROPE ∧ NORTH-AMERICA ∧ AUSTRALIA ∧  
  NEW-ZEALAND ∧ JAPAN  
DEF: NON-COMPLIANCE-MECHANISM  
FEATURE: COMPLIANCE-BOARD IMPOSES PENALTIES: SURCHARGES ∧ TRADING-SUSPENSION  
PURPOSE: SUPPORT&COMPEL ANNEX-B PARTIES TO MEET EMISSION-TARGETS  
ISSUE: TARGETS=BINDING BUT MODEST ∧ US NON-RATIFICATION ∴ EFFECTIVENESS↓
